Uses of Interface
io.github.igorgf.control.Option

Packages that use Option
Package
Description
io.github.igorgf.control
Core functional control-flow types for error handling and value presence.

  • Uses of Option in io.github.igorgf.control

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    (package private) final record 
    Empty<T>
    The value absence representing implementation of Option.
    (package private) final record 
    Present<T>
    The value presence representing implementation of Option.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T> Option<T>
    Option.empty()
    Factory method for creating a new Empty<T> instance, containing the type information but no value.
    Option<T>

    Facilitates conditional short-circuiting.

    Facilitates conditional short-circuiting.

    Facilitates conditional short-circuiting.

    Factory method for creating a new Present<T> instance.
    default <X extends Exception>
    Option<T>
    Option.or(CheckedSupplier<? extends Option<? extends T>, ? extends X> supplier)
    If this is a Present, returns this describing the value, otherwise uses the supplier to return a new Option<T>.
